Wipro Ltd

Wipro Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

Wipro Ltd

₹ 176 1.20%
03 Jul - close price
wipro.com BSE: 507685 NSE: WIPRO
About

Wipro Ltd is a global Information technology, consulting and business process services (BPS) company.[1]

It is the 4th largest Indian player in the global IT services industry behind TCS, Infosys and HCL Technologies.[2]

Key Points

Business Segments

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 1,74,382 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 176
  • High / Low ₹ 273 / 169
  • Stock P/E 13.2
  • Book Value ₹ 83.9
  • Dividend Yield 6.25 %
  • ROCE 17.8 %
  • ROE 15.5 %
  • Face Value ₹ 2.00
Edit ratios

Pros

  • Stock is providing a good dividend yield of 6.25%.
  • Company has been maintaining a healthy dividend payout of 46.7%

Cons

  • The company has delivered a poor sales growth of 8.38% over past five years.

* The pros and cons are machine generated. Pros / cons are based on a checklist to highlight important points. Please exercise caution and do your own analysis.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment of ESOP / ESPS 2d
  • Completion Of Extinguishment Of 60,00,00,000 (Sixty Crore) Equity Shares Of The Company Pursuant To Buyback
    30 Jun - Wipro extinguished 60 crore shares after buyback; equity capital fell to 9,90,35,49,797 shares.
  • Disclosures under Reg. 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
    29 Jun - Zash Traders disclosed 12.40 crore Wipro shares tendered in buyback on June 24, 2026.
  • Disclosures under Reg. 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 29 Jun
  • Disclosures under Reg. 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 29 Jun
